description: Reducto is a document processing platform that turns PDFs, images, spreadsheets, and office documents into structured data for parsing, extraction, classification, splitting, editing, and workflow orchestration. It also provides browser-based Studio tooling and enterprise deployment options including VPC and on-prem setups.
summary: Reducto exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at platform.reducto.ai, a hosted and local MCP server, and a Python-distributed CLI; no GraphQL surface was found.
